description: Tracks audit history per target for cooldown logic

cli.notes: tool_installer.py at 17% (many installation paths untested - requires mocking external tools). tool_commands.py at 91%. 1 failing test (test_lynis_version_command - test expectation mismatch with dict-based VERSION_COMMANDS). Main gaps: actual binary download/install paths. Security: subprocess calls use shell=False.

core.notes: history_db.py 85%, dedup_enhanced.py 91%, normalize_and_report.py 79%. 323 tests passing. Main gaps: batch_insert_findings (lines 1598-1628), upsert_findings_batch (1669-1717), batch_insert_findings_optimized (1758-1803). SQL properly parameterized. No injection vectors.

adapters.notes: 558 tests passing. All 29 adapters audited. 100%: bandit, gosec, noseyparker, trufflehog, zap. 95-99%: bearer, checkov, hadolint, semgrep, shellcheck, syft, trivy, semgrep_secrets. 85-94%: remaining adapters. No new issues found - all use safe_load_json_file() and parameterized severity mapping.

reporters.notes: 392 tests passing. 13 reporters audited. 100%: diff_sarif, policy, suppression. 95-98%: basic, compliance, diff_md, simple_html, yaml. 83-94%: csv, diff_json, diff_html, html, sarif. XSS prevention in html_reporter.py (lines 73-86) escapes </script>, <script, <!--, backticks. No injection vectors found.

security.notes: Cross-cutting CWE analysis complete. No critical vulnerabilities. 4 coverage gaps identified: archive_security.py (19%), secure_temp.py (77%), gitlab_ci.py (8%). All subprocess calls use shell=False (except 1 nosec). Path traversal prevention in place. SQL injection protected via parameterized queries. YAML uses safe_load throughout. No pickle/eval/exec usage.
